items.title_en: Japan core inflation holds steady in May, matching expectations despite energy price concerns

items.desc_en: Headline inflation edged up to 1.5% from 1.4%, while the so called "core-core" inflation rate, eased to 1.8% from 1.9%.
items.desc_zh: 总体通胀率从 1.4% 微升至 1.5%，而所谓的“核心-核心”通胀率则从 1.9% 降至 1.8%。

items.desc_zh: 加泰罗尼亚当局证实，这名 63 岁的老人周三在帕劳德诺格拉地区死亡。

items.title_en: Moscow hit by largest Ukrainian attack since start of Russia's full-scale war
items.title_zh: 莫斯科遭遇俄罗斯全面战争爆发以来最大规模的乌克兰袭击
items.desc_en: A refinery and a shopping centre were burning after almost 200 Ukrainian drones struck an area to the south-east of the Russian capital.
items.desc_zh: 近 200 架乌克兰无人机袭击了俄罗斯首都东南部的一个地区，一座炼油厂和一座购物中心被烧毁。

items.title_en: Lawyer in high-profile Ugandan treason case charged with related offence
items.title_zh: 备受瞩目的乌干达叛国案律师被控相关罪行
items.desc_en: Uganda's military chief had boasted of "the hurt and pain" he would inflict on Erias Lukwago, who was arrested earlier this week.
items.desc_zh: 乌干达军事首领吹嘘他会给本周早些时候被捕的埃里亚斯·卢瓦戈造成“伤害和痛苦”。

items.title_en: Suspected gang leader shot dead in flower bouquet ambush at airport
items.title_zh: 涉嫌团伙头目在机场鲜花花束伏击中被枪杀
items.desc_en: The gunmen concealed their weapons behind flowers and stuffed toys while waiting for the victim outside Guayaquil airport.
items.desc_zh: 枪手在瓜亚基尔机场外等待受害者时，将武器藏在鲜花和毛绒玩具后面。

items.title_en: Gunfire and explosions heard at Niger capital's airport
items.title_zh: 尼日尔首都机场传出枪声和爆炸声
items.desc_en: Niger has been fighting a militant Islamist insurgency for a decade and in January suspected jihadists attacked the same airport.
items.desc_zh: 尼日尔十年来一直在与激进的伊斯兰叛乱分子作战，今年一月，疑似圣战分子袭击了同一机场。

items.title_en: Apple to raise prices as AI boom pushes up chip costs
items.title_zh: 人工智能热潮推高芯片成本 苹果将提价
items.desc_en: The firm's outgoing boss Tim Cook did not say when prices would rise or which products would be affected.
items.desc_zh: 该公司即将卸任的老板蒂姆·库克没有透露价格何时上涨或哪些产品会受到影响。

items.title_en: Stock futures rise as Fed hints at possible rate hike in 2026; Kospi hits over 9,000 for the first time: Live updates
items.title_zh: 美联储暗示 2026 年可能加息，股指期货上涨； Kospi 首次突破 9,000：实时更新
items.desc_en: After hitting a fresh intraday all-time high, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ultimately closed more than 500 points lower on Wednesday.
items.desc_zh: 道琼斯工业平均指数周三创下盘中新高后，最终收盘下跌 500 多点。

items.title_en: Bird flu kills more than 75% of baby seals on remote Australian island, study finds
items.title_zh: 研究发现，澳大利亚偏远岛屿上75%以上的小海豹死于禽流感
items.desc_en: Scientists say 13,000 southern elephant seal pups on Heard Island have died of the H5N1 strain.
items.desc_zh: 科学家表示，赫德岛上有 13,000 只南象海豹幼崽死于 H5N1 病毒株。

items.title_en: Japan ramping up defence is 'critical' to prevent war, Defence Minister Koizumi tells BBC
items.title_zh: 日本防卫大臣小泉纯一郎告诉 BBC，日本加强防卫对于防止战争“至关重要”
items.desc_en: Japan needs to revisit the pacifist posture that has defined it since World War Two, Shinjiro Koizumi says.
items.desc_zh: 小泉进二郎表示，日本需要重新审视自第二次世界大战以来定义的和平主义姿态。
